salientSummary: Read-only unified-diff pane for the working copy: UncommittedDiffModel pair-fetches `git diff` + `git diff --staged` concurrently inside one focus.queue.run; DiffLineView + FileDiffView + UncommittedDiffView render the result inside a LazyVStack-backed ScrollView; RootView's right column now hosts UncommittedDiffView. Strictly read-only: no Stage/Discard/Revert buttons anywhere in the diff subtree. 7 new ViewModel tests against real GitFixtureHelper repos + 6 md5-distinct FileDiffView snapshots (5 light + 1 dark parity) + 3 authored XCUITests. Full KiteTests suite green: 228 Swift Testing cases in 35 suites + 48 XCTest cases (221 baseline + 7 new VM); VAL-DIFF-001/002/004/005/006/007 fulfilled.
whatWasImplemented: Sources/ViewModels/UncommittedDiffModel.swift — @Observable @MainActor; cancel-prior-Task discipline on reload(for:) matching INTERFACES.md §4 fan-out rule; concurrent `async let` pair of `git diff --no-color --patch -U3` and `git diff --no-color --patch -U3 --staged` inside a single focus.queue.run closure (queue boundary outer, subprocess fan-out inner — same shape as GraphModel). Errors log via os.Logger category `diff` per AGENTS.md no-silent-swallow rule and surface as lastError on the model. Sources/Views/Diff/DiffLineView.swift — pure presentational view over DiffLine, 4-variant switch (context / added / removed / noNewlineMarker), monospaced SF with `+ green / - red / context primary` coloring on faint backgrounds (VAL-DIFF-004). Sources/Views/Diff/FileDiffView.swift — renders one FileDiff with header (icon + path) then either the binary-file placeholder (VAL-DIFF-005) or hunk-header + DiffLineView iteration. `plus.circle` / `minus.circle` / `doc` icons discriminate new / deleted / modified. Sources/Views/Diff/UncommittedDiffView.swift — container observing RepoStore.focus; `.task(id: focus?.repo.id)` drives initial + focus-swap reload, `.onChange(of: focus?.lastChangeAt)` drives FSEvents-triggered refresh; ContentUnavailableView empty states for clean-tree (VAL-DIFF-002) and no-focus; LazyVStack for virtualization (VAL-DIFF-006). Accessibility identifiers: UncommittedDiff, UncommittedDiff.Empty, UncommittedDiff.NoFocus, UncommittedDiff.Error, UncommittedDiff.Section.<name>, FileDiff.<path>, FileDiff.Binary. Sources/Views/RootView.swift — right detail column `Text("Diff")` placeholder replaced with UncommittedDiffView(). Tests/KiteTests/ViewModelTests/UncommittedDiffModelTests.swift — 7 Swift Testing cases against real GitFixtureHelper repos: clean tree empty, unstaged populated, staged populated, mixed (staged A + unstaged B), untracked-not-in-diff (documented caveat), 1000-line large diff (proves M1-fix-git-run-drain in effect — asserts elapsed < 30s and ≥1000 diff lines), concurrent double-reload cancellation convergence. Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/UncommittedDiffSnapshotTests.swift — 6 snapshots on FileDiffView with NSAppearance explicit + windowBackgroundColor wrapper per AGENTS.md discipline; covers SimpleAddedLines, MixedAddRemove, Binary, MultipleHunks, NoNewlineAtEOF (light) + MixedAddRemove (dark); all 6 md5s distinct (1b39d6…, 3cc831…, 7d2b46…, 99309…, bd216f…, c29b85…). Tests/KiteUITests/UncommittedDiffUITests.swift — 3 XCUITests authored: testDiffShowsAfterFocus (VAL-DIFF-001), testCleanTreeEmptyState (VAL-DIFF-002), testNoDestructiveActions (VAL-DIFF-007). Xcode project regenerated via xcodegen. No files owned by git-engine-worker were touched.
whatWasLeftUndone: XCUITest suite Tests/KiteUITests/UncommittedDiffUITests.swift is authored but not executed — macOS TCC still blocks the XCUITest harness attachment on this host (same state as every prior milestone's XCUI suite since M3). VAL-DIFF-006 is asserted via LazyVStack virtualization in UncommittedDiffView plus the 1000-line ViewModel test proving Git.run can drain a large diff; the full 10k-line Instruments capture (<200MB memory, 60fps scroll) remains a `manual` assertion in validation-contract.md, deferred to the scrutiny-validator-diff milestone gate. The right pane currently always shows the uncommitted diff — M7-commit-diff will introduce the uncommitted/selected-commit mode toggle and observe GraphModel.selectedSHA to drive `git show` on commit-row tap.

commandsRun.observation: Project regenerated cleanly after adding 3 Sources/Views/Diff/*.swift, Sources/ViewModels/UncommittedDiffModel.swift, and the 3 test files.
7 of 7 tests passed in ~3.3s; largeDiffSucceeds completed in 0.48s with 1000+ diff lines parsed, confirming M1-fix-git-run-drain pipe-drain is active on this code path.
6 of 6 tests passed; all 6 recorded PNG md5s distinct (verified via `find __Snapshots__/UncommittedDiffSnapshotTests -name '*.png' -exec md5 -r {} \; | sort -u | wc -l` → 6).
228 Swift Testing cases in 35 suites passed + 48 XCTest cases in ~108s (221 baseline + 7 new VM tests).
3 of 3 tests passed — no --force / reset --hard / git clean introduced by this feature (VAL-SEC-001/002/003 still green).

interactiveChecks.action: UI verification deferred: XCUITest harness blocked by host TCC; authored suite Tests/KiteUITests/UncommittedDiffUITests.swift is committed with 3 cases (testDiffShowsAfterFocus, testCleanTreeEmptyState, testNoDestructiveActions). Unit-level behavior for all 6 fulfilled VAL-DIFF assertions is covered by UncommittedDiffModelTests against real GitFixtureHelper repos plus snapshot coverage of the presentational FileDiffView. Grep over Sources/Views/Diff/**.swift confirmed zero occurrences of --force / reset --hard / git clean / Stage/Discard/Revert button actions.
interactiveChecks.observed: Not run interactively in this environment — called out explicitly per swiftui-worker SKILL step 8.

discoveredIssues.description: UncommittedDiffUITests is committed but not executed in this environment due to host TCC (Accessibility + Automation prompts not accepted). Same state as every prior milestone's XCUI suite — whenever the host grants those permissions, this suite should be un-gated and run alongside the other KiteUITests suites.

Per-focus observer fan-out count at M7: 4 observers (branch list + status header + graph + uncommitted diff). INTERFACES.md §4 called for consolidation into a shared RepoDetailModel BEFORE M7 ships; that consolidation was deferred per the worker brief ('mission scope + timeline does not call for RepoDetailModel consolidation in v1, but cancel-prior-Task discipline IS required'). Cancel-prior-Task discipline is enforced in UncommittedDiffModel.reload (via loadTask?.cancel()), matching GraphModel. A 5th observer (M7-commit-diff) would push this to the 'runaway concurrency' zone flagged in INTERFACES.md §4 — the consolidation should happen before or alongside M7-commit-diff rather than being postponed again.

VAL-DIFF-006 is satisfied structurally via LazyVStack in UncommittedDiffView (per-row lazy materialization) plus the 1000-line ViewModel test proving Git.run drains large diffs without deadlock. The full 10k-line + Instruments memory-profile + 60fps scroll evidence remains `manual` per validation-contract.md §VAL-DIFF-006 and should be captured at the scrutiny-validator-diff gate.
